subjects.note: stratified clip-level (gaze 5:2.5:2.5, distr 8:1:1). subject leakage 있음 — 실사용 참고용

clean_only_baseline.description: Train on clean only. Evaluate separately on clean and masked.

clean_masked_augmentation_baseline.description: Train on fixed 1:1 clean+masked paired items. Occlusion label is included in JSON but must not be used by baseline.

proposed_region_aware.description: Train on the same fixed 1:1 clean+masked paired items. Only proposed model uses occ_label_vector as auxiliary supervision.

notes: stratified clip-level split: source별 비율 보존.
test gaze 영상 충분 확보(=fixed split 동급) — gaze F1 안정.
단 subject leakage 있음 (clip-level). baseline 비교 불가, 실사용 참고용.
